rationale: Attack on US consulate in Toronto with officer shot is a new and direct security incident involving US diplomatic facilities; combined with ongoing Iran economic risk and Xi-Kim axis deepening, this cycle maintains elevated relevance for a US resident.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating attack on US consulate
top_events.summary: A police officer was shot while responding to an attack on the US consulate in Toronto; a direct security incident at US diplomatic facilities in a close ally country, raising concerns about threats to American personnel abroad.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: World Bank warning continues; US military costs, oil market volatility and domestic inflation risk remain elevated but no new escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's confirmed visit deepens the China-DPRK axis, complicating US strategic positioning in the Indo-Pacific and adding pressure to an already stretched US foreign policy posture.
